headline: Should Revvity’s (RVTY) Claude Integration Reframe How Investors View Its Data and AI Strategy?
summary: In early July 2026, Anthropic announced that Revvity Signals Software joined its Model Context Protocol connector directory, allowing scientists to access Signals AI and connected R&D knowledge directly through Claude, including the Claude Science workbench. This move links Claude’s reasoning tools with Revvity’s governed, ontology-driven scientific data, potentially making AI-driven discovery workflows more accessible to life sciences researchers who already rely on Revvity’s Signals...
